title: puck: T-Echo build misses crc32_ieee dependency
description: Discovered while validating project-LICHEN-9nrr.3. west build -b t_echo/nrf52840 lichen/apps/puck -d build/puck_t_echo --pristine=always compiles the app but fails at zephyr_pre0 link: app/libapp.a(main.c.obj) send_beacon() references crc32_ieee at lichen/apps/puck/src/main.c:130, but the build does not link/provide that symbol. The same build also emits pre-existing warnings for unused last_info_ms and s_iid when CONFIG_LICHEN_NATIVE is not enabled, but the link error is the blocker. Scope: add the correct Zephyr CRC library/config dependency or replace the call with the project helper used elsewhere, preserving beacon payload behavior. Acceptance: west build -b t_echo/nrf52840 lichen/apps/puck compiles and links; crc32 behavior for beacon payloads remains compatible with existing vectors/protocol expectations; no unrelated puck behavior changes.
close_reason: Completed: added CONFIG_CRC to puck prj.conf so crc32_ieee links for T-Echo, verified t_echo/nrf52840 puck build compiles and links, confirmed CRC object inclusion, and filed follow-up for pre-existing non-native warnings.
